title: Darkmode Mist
description: Changes the mist on hypixel skyblock to be in darkmode.
body:
# SkyOcean - Darkmode Mist
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1296157888343179264?color=8c03fc&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/FsRc2GUwZR) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/dIczrQAR?style=flat&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyocean)
Darkmode mist is a pack that changes the look of the mist in hypixel skyblock into a dark style, it uses vanilla texture paths so it is compatible with other packs and it will also only retexture blocks in the mist, leaving all other snow, ice and glass unchanged. ## Installation Guide - Prerequisites: [SkyOcean](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyocean) - You must also enable the option `Retexture Mist` - Download in your favourite launcher or into your resourcepacks folder directly
